name: Region Insight
description: Search POIs and analyze fenced-area distributions in specified areas.
description_zh: 区域洞察提供 POI 定位、围栏内 POI 查询与聚合能力。
description_en: Search POIs and analyze fenced-area distributions in specified areas.
examples_zh: 查找上海妇女用品商店并返回 GCJ-02 坐标
统计成都建设路邻里生活广场周边 1000 米内不同分类的 POI 数量
查询指定圆形区域内的餐饮 POI 列表
examples_en: Find Shanghai Women's Articles Store and return its GCJ-02 coordinates
Count POIs by category within 1,000 meters of Chengdu Jianshe Road Neighborhood Life Plaza
List dining POIs within a specified circular area
